title: Chewy Adventurous Mint Stir-fry
description: A chewy and adventurous Korean dish featuring dried mint, seasoned with umami elements for a unique flavor profile that caters to Jain-friendly dietary practices.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or frying pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger. Sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add red pepper flakes and stir-fry for another 20 seconds.
Push the garlic mixture to one side of the pan, add dried mint leaves on the other side. Stir-fry for about a minute until mint is slightly wilted but not fully cooked.
Return the garlic mixture back to the pan, then add chicken breast pieces and soy sauce. Toss together, allowing it to cook through at medium heat (around 180°F-200°F).
Add diced carrots, finely chopped onions, and sliced zucchini. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until all vegetables are cooked but still retain their crunch.
Season with salt as needed and serve hot.
